title: link_layer.py: O(n) sender discovery tries all peers per frame
description:
src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:456-505 _find_sender() method tries all known peers to verify a signature for every received frame. For n peers, this is O(n) signature verifications per frame.

Ed25519 is fast (~15k verifications/sec), but on constrained devices with 100+ peers, this adds latency. Code has a TODO acknowledging this.
close_reason: Known limitation documented in code. Requires frame format change to include sender IID. TODOs acknowledge this.
